text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The horizontal axis is here, so taking the width of
the claw into account... Just a little more... I need
to move it a little more...

text_block_list.name: Arcade Employee
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry! This machine has been acting up
lately...

text_block_list.name: Arcade Employee
text_block_list.text:
I don't think it will be fixed anytime soon, so I'll
give you a refund.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Awww... I wanted to try out my
new-and-improved "Diamond Drop" technique...
